name: TRIO-TECH INTERNATIONAL
summary: Trio-Tech International is a California-incorporated company providing reliability test equipment and services to the semiconductor and other industries. It operates two segments: Semiconductor Back-end Solutions (SBS), which designs and manufactures burn-in systems, burn-in boards, and offers electrical, environmental, and burn-in testing services; and Industrial Electronics (IE), which manufactures environmental chambers, leak detectors, autoclaves, centrifuges, HAST testers, and distributes electronic components and equipment globally across the U.S., Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, and China.

products.name: Burn-in Systems
products.description: Equipment used in testing structural integrity of integrated circuits in semiconductor back-end manufacturing.

products.name: Burn-in Boards
products.description: Boards used in burn-in and reliability testing of semiconductors.

products.name: Environmental Chambers
products.description: Temperature and humidity controlled chambers for industrial and consumer market testing.

products.name: Leak Detectors
products.description: Equipment used in manufacturing process testing across various industries.

products.name: Autoclaves
products.description: Pressure-based testing equipment for industrial manufacturing processes.

products.name: Centrifuges
products.description: Equipment used in industrial and semiconductor manufacturing test processes.

products.name: Dynamic Testers
products.description: Testing equipment for industrial and consumer market manufacturing processes.

products.name: HAST Testers
products.description: Highly Accelerated Stress Test equipment for reliability testing in various industries.

products.name: Temperature-Controlled Chucks
products.description: Precision temperature control devices used in semiconductor and industrial testing.

products.name: Burn-in and Reliability Testing Services
products.description: Comprehensive electrical, environmental, and burn-in testing services for semiconductor manufacturers in Asia.

products.name: Preventive Maintenance and Calibration Services
products.description: Maintenance, calibration, repair, upgrading, and refurbishment services for temperature, humidity, and pressurization equipment.
